name: REDCapAgentRecordTools
description: REDCapAgentRecordTools is a lightweight External Module that exposes record-related actions as callable agent tools for the SecureChatAI agent orchestration system.

records_getUserIdByFullName.description: Agent tool: resolve a REDCap record ID from a full name

records_getClinicalData.description: Agent tool: fetch clinical records for a REDCap record
